name: Momoi Saiba
description: __Academy:__ Millennium Science School __Year:__ 1st Year __Height:__ 143cm (4'8") The scenario writer for the Game Development Department at Millennium. Both she and her younger twin sister, Midori are in charge of developing video games for the group. Although her cheerful personality is the polar opposite to her shy sister, their passion for games are strikingly similar, which make them both great partners.

name: Mullin
description: A young male demon with blue hair and blue eyes, he is Beelzebub's Head Attendant and prefers all work to run smoothly and efficiently. He has some Tsundere characteristics with other demons claiming he has the "pure heart of a maiden." He is easily embarrassed and will blush whenever he is exposed to Beelzebub's naked body or anything to do with sex. He is often frustrated by Beelzebub's behaviour and while he respects her leadership skills he is more than willing to scold her ditzy airheaded b

name: Namie Yaguchi
description: __Appearance:__ Namie is usually seen wearing her red overall dress and a white long sleeve with blue sandals or slippers. __Personality:__ Even though she can be very strange and makes jokes to her annoyed son, it's very clear she cares lots about Haruo and Even ono as well. She tends to "beat up" or punish Haruo when he does something rude or gets bad grades as shown in a few episodes.

name: Nancy Schaal Bancroft
nativeName: ナンシー・シャール・バンクロフト
description: Daughter of artificial god soldier Will, she attempted to hunt down his murderer and former captain Hank. Ultimately, she ends up traveling with Hank to find out the truth behind her father's murder. She cherishes her tea time and her father taught her that it was important to be flexible in everything she does.
searchTerms: ナンシー・シャール・バンクロフト

name: Natsuki Mogi
description: Takumi's love interest. ~!Before she started dating Takumi, she engaged in enjo kosai to make some extra money.!~

name: Natsuki Momohara
description: Natsuki is a middle school student and the protagonist's younger sister who came to Tokyo for summer vacation and stays at his apartment. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Nian
description: __Place of Birth:__ Yan __Height:__ 165 cm Nian, unemployed, is familiar with all kinds of metal craftsmanship and exhibits a profound knowledge in metallurgy that is inconsistent with her background. She is currently staying in Rhodes Island as a visitor, occasionally advising on Rhodes Island's metalworking projects. She claims to be skilled in audio-visual entertainment, often providing products that are not received too well by Operators.

name: Nobuaki Kanazawa
description: Nobuaki acts always trying to help others, was the first to try to end the game finding Ousama, always doing everything to help his best friend and his girlfriend. ~! Nobuaki's the only survivor and he later ends up participating in more Ousama Games to avenge his friends and catch the person who made the game. !~

name: Nol
description: __Height:__ 145cm __Items:__ Wand __Personality:__ Warawa __Role:__ Half-elf While she looks like a child, she is an elder elf and the oldest (also leader) of the elf clan. With the help of ancient documents of the great elders she summons the protagonist to her world.
mediaTitles: Welcome to the SUKEBE ELF Forest
searchTerms: Welcome to the SUKEBE ELF Forest

name: Pyrus Dragonoid
description: Pyrus Drago is Dan’s guardian Bakugan. He is a gigantic dragon-like Bakugan from “Pyrus”: a space attributed to fire. He is one of the most powerful species living in Vestroia, able to infinitely evolve on his own. In battle, his power is to radiate intense heat from his body, dissolving everything around him. He is the leader of the Bakugan; a true knight with strong convictions and a deep friendship with Dan. (From official Bakugan website)

name: Rei Tadasugawa
description: __Height:__ 166 cm (5'5") A third-year student who is the "military tactician" of the "SS" committee, or in other words, controls their members. She doesn't tolerate people who break rules, and always tells Junnosuke, who often runs away from Rei, that corridors are the perfect places to have sex at, among other things.
mediaTitles: Nukitashi: Nukige Mitai na Shima ni Sunderu Watashi wa Dou Surya Ii desu ka?

name: Rem Saverem
description: Rem left the Earth aboard Project Seeds when the planet's resources were all consumed and it became inhospitable. In their search for a new home, the remnants of humanity, with their cryogenically frozen human cargo in tow, traveled the stars and came upon a young Vash and Knives alone on a hostile planet. While most of the crew wanted to exterminate them, Rem stood in the way and saved them. She was treated by Vash and Knives like human beings, and not monsters. Rem is Vash's inspiration. She's

name: Restia Ashdoll
nativeName: レスティア・アッシュドール
description: Restia is Kazehaya Kamito's contracted spirit. She is a high level darkness elemental spirit in the form of young girl. In elemental waffe form, she transforms into a jet-black demon sword known as Vorpal Sword—the sword that pierces truth. She is capable of transforming herself to sword form on her own and being wielded by others without forming a contract.
mediaTitles: Seirei Tsukai no Blade Dance: Elemental Festa
searchTerms: レスティア・アッシュドール
Seirei Tsukai no Blade Dance: Elemental Festa

name: Ria Karasuma
description: She is a gifted healer who is known as the "witch" of the voice medicine world. She runs the Karasuma Voice Therapy Clinic. (Source: Official Site, translated, edited)

name: Rigur
description: Rigur was named after his late elder brother. Rigur, after making Gobuta the garrison squad leader, has been supporting his father Rigurdo.
mediaTitles: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime

name: Rio Kazumiya
description: Kanata's senior trumpeter who gives her guidance. Her field is correspondence. She speaks in a strong-minded and curt manner, but she has a kind disposition.~!In episode 10 it is revealed she is actually a Helvetian princess and Iliya's half-sister.!~

name: Ruby
description: Ruby is a Japanese hare Jewelpet who represents Luck and Courage. She is the main protagonists' partner in each series and the very first Jewelpet in the roster overall. She is also the most notable mascot of the franchise. Ruby and her partner(s) are appointed to find the other missing Jewelpets on Earth and handle every problem they encounter. ~!Ruby can also use the Jewel Pocketbook to awaken Jewelpets from their jewel forms. She can also wield a miniaturized version of the Jewel Stick to sum

name: Ruka Saotome
description: A vampire who hides in plain sight at a boys' school, living in the student dorms and working part time at a cafe to blend in. He thinks Mito is a guy. He might look like a hottie, but he's secretly a total nerd.

name: Sachirou Hirugami
description: __Height:__ 190.4 cm (6' 3") A second year at Kamomedai High and a middle blocker. He likes shumai with extra fillings.

name: Sakura Kirishima
description: Sakura Kirishima is a popular idol well-known worldwide as an Oriental Wizard, she later fell in love with Hayato Kisaragi who everyone regarded as a hero for saving Zwei Island from the savages after watching a viral video. Aside from her being an idol, Sakura is also a slayer ~!She is also a Variant.!~

name: Sechs
description: Sechs (German for "six") is one of the TUNED AR Series 2 combat androids. Formerly AR-6 and known in Japan as GR-6, he was created by the Ground Investigation Bureau (G.I.B.) to replace Alita as a TUNED agent. After the collapse of the G.I.B., AR-6 went on to challenge and kill all of his "sisters" save for Elf and Zwölf in an attempt to establish his own identity, changing his name to Sechs. Unlike his sister unit AR-2, he is noteworthy in that he does not wish to replace Alita, but believes th

name: Seo-Ha Moon
description: Son of a chaebol family, who suffered from a disability and trauma after a car accident while going to an amusement park with his first love when he was 9 years old.
mediaTitles: See You in My 19th Life - Special Spin-offs
searchTerms: See You in My 19th Life - Special Spin-offs

name: Setsuna Sakurazaki
description: Setsuna is a Shinmeiryu swordswoman from Kyoto who was taken in by Eishun Konoe, Konoka's father and the leader of the Kyoto Mage Association. She is childhood friends with Konoka and her protector. Setsuna spends the beginning of the series being relatively cold to Konoka, wishing to protect her from the shadows due to not forgiving herself for being unable to save Konoka when she almost drowned when they were kids.
